message:
fix(core): fix proptest_completion_token private API usage and expand to 45 tests (wa-hbvz)

Replace from_u8 tests (private API) with public-facing ordinal checks.
Restructure into focused proptest! blocks, add TokenSummary serde,
boundary preset coverage, and tracker state transition tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
